title: Namakkal poultry sector flags feed-grain shortage as maize prices climb
summary: Namakkal poultry farmers — who account for nearly 60 percent of South Indian egg production — have flagged a feed-grain shortage as maize prices have risen 22 percent in two months, squeezing per-egg margins.

title: Namakkal lorry transport hub records 14 percent freight movement growth
summary: Namakkal — India's largest lorry-owners hub — has recorded a 14 percent year-on-year increase in freight movement in April, driven by export traffic from Tiruppur and steel from Salem.

title: Tiruchengode Anna University campus hosts state robotics finale
summary: The state-level inter-collegiate robotics championship finale is being hosted at Anna University's Tiruchengode regional campus this weekend, drawing 84 teams from across Tamil Nadu.

title: Namakkal collector reviews counting hall security at five centres
summary: The Namakkal District Collector inspected counting hall security and EVM strong room arrangements at five centres covering all five Assembly constituencies in the district.

title: Cauvery delta sand quarrying restrictions extended for monsoon
summary: The Public Works Department has extended sand-quarrying restrictions along Cauvery basin reaches in Namakkal for an additional six weeks, citing monsoon riverbed sensitivity.

title: Namakkal egg prices steady despite festive demand fluctuation
summary: Wholesale egg prices at Namakkal NECC mandi have held steady at Rs 5.32 per egg this week, despite seasonal festive demand fluctuations across South India.

title: Kolli Hills tribal cooperative launches branded millet snack range
summary: The Kolli Hills tribal women's cooperative has launched a branded millet-based snack range in partnership with a Coimbatore food-tech firm, with retail rollout across Kongu cities this week.

title: Solar pump scheme covers 4,200 Namakkal farms in current cycle
summary: The PM-KUSUM solar pumpset scheme has covered 4,200 Namakkal farms in the current cycle, with TANGEDCO confirming an additional 1,800 connections will be sanctioned over the next quarter.

title: Rasipuram pure-silk handloom cluster gets export-promotion package
summary: The Rasipuram pure-silk handloom cluster has been included in the textile ministry's export-promotion package, granting access to subsidised credit, design support and overseas exhibition slots.

title: Namakkal under heavy rain alert from May 3; civic teams placed on standby
summary: Namakkal has been placed under a yellow heavy rainfall alert from May 3, with municipal teams on standby across Rasipuram, Tiruchengode and Paramathi-Velur taluks for waterlogging response.

title: Namakkal Anjaneyar temple draws weekend pilgrim surge
summary: The 18-foot tall Anjaneyar temple in Namakkal — one of the tallest open-air Hanuman idols in India — recorded over 38,000 pilgrim visits over the weekend, prompting additional crowd-management arrangements.

title: Truck driver health-screening drive launched at Namakkal terminals
summary: A free health-screening drive for long-haul truck drivers has been launched at three major Namakkal lorry terminals, focusing on cardiac risk, vision testing and sleep-disorder assessment.
